Premier League Preview: Arsenal vs Manchester United Showdown

Premier League Preview: Arsenal vs Manchester United Showdown

Arsenal will take on Manchester United this weekend in a high-stakes Premier League clash, aiming to extend their home winning streak and solidify their position at the top of the table.

The Gunners have been in strong form at home, but they remain cautious about United’s new-manager bounce under Michael Carrick, making this fixture a pivotal one for both sides as the season approaches the business end.
